name: Potential Local File Read Vulnerability In JVM Based Application
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Moti Harmats
SIGMA Title: Potential Local File Read Vulnerability In JVM Based Application
SIGMA Description: Detects potential local file read vulnerability in JVM based apps.
If the exceptions are caused due to user input and contain path traversal payloads then it's a red flag.


False positives:
- Application bugs

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%filenotfoundexception%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/../../..%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Potential Local File Read Vulnerability In JVM Based Application on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%filenotfoundexception%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/../../..%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Potential Local File Read Vulnerability In JVM Based Application
